parameters.text:
You are generating the design tokens CSS file for PROMIN Antenna Studio.

UI Spec (tokens section):
{{ $json.uiSpec }}

Current index.css:
{{ $json.files['index.css'] }}

Generate the COMPLETE new index.css file. Requirements:
1. Keep `@import "tailwindcss";` at the top
2. Use `@theme { }` block for all CSS custom properties
3. Include ALL tokens from the spec: colors, spacing, typography, radius, shadows, transitions, z-index, sizes, chart colors
4. Keep the dark theme aesthetic (deep indigo/slate backgrounds)
5. Ensure smooth-scrolling and font-family are preserved
6. Add any utility classes needed (e.g., .scrollbar-thin, transitions)

Output the COMPLETE file content wrapped in:
<file path="src/index.css">
...complete CSS content...
</file>

Output ONLY the file block, no explanations.

options.systemMessage: You are a CSS design system engineer. You generate complete, production-ready CSS files with comprehensive design tokens. Use Tailwind CSS 4 @theme syntax. Output only the file block.

5. Proper z-index for overlays from token system

Preserve ALL existing 3D logic (React Three Fiber, antenna models, camera). Only update the overlay UI and styling.
